description: Accounts of many names and corresponding monetary values, perhaps payments. Dating is 18th- or 19th-century based on the mention of Ottoman kurush. The word "leather" may appear in the upper left heading but the scribal rendering of the word "גלד" makes this reading uncertain. It may be possible to provide a clearer dating estimate based on future analysis of the names mentioned: Mūrad Agha al-Nazīr, Shaykh Aḥmad al-Raqabawī, Raḥman Arnavūt, Badawiī Ḥamd, Ḥuseyn Abū-Raʾīs, Guirguis Barbārī, Ḥajj Aḥ[mad] al-Shāmī, Muḥammad Darwīsh, among many others. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
